mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.remarks AS "remarks", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.owner_code AS "ownerCode", a.group_id_ AS "groupId", a.name_ AS "name", a.ext_ AS "ext", a.type_ AS "type", a.size_ AS "size", a.path_ AS "path", a.pdf_path_ AS "pdfPath", a.thumb_path_ AS "thumbPath", a.upload_time_ AS "uploadTime", a.upload_user_id_ AS "uploadUser.id", a.upload_user_name_ AS "uploadUser.name", a.sort AS "sort", a.desc_ AS "desc", a.duration_ AS "duration", a.sec_flag_ AS "secFlag", a.visit_count_ AS "visitCount", a.to_pdf_ AS "toPdf", a.secret_level AS "secretLevel", a.url, a.thumb_url AS "thumbUrl", a.primary_path_ as primaryPath, a.edit_objects AS "editObjects"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_file_( id, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, remarks, del_flag, owner_code, group_id_, name_, ext_, type_, size_, path_, pdf_path_, thumb_path_, upload_time_, upload_user_id_, upload_user_name_, sort, desc_, duration_, sec_flag_, visit_count_, to_pdf_, secret_level, url, thumb_url, primary_path_ , edit_objects ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{createBy.id}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy.id}, #{updateDate}, #{remarks}, #{delFlag}, #{ownerCode}, #{groupId}, #{name}, #{ext}, #{type}, #{size}, #{path}, #{pdfPath}, #{thumbPath}, #{uploadTime}, #{uploadUser.id}, #{uploadUser.name}, #{sort}, #{desc}, #{duration}, #{secFlag}, #{visitCount}, #{toPdf}, #{secretLevel}, #{url}, #{thumbUrl}, #{primaryPath}, #{editObjects} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_file_ SET update_by = #{updateBy.id}, update_date = #{updateDate}, remarks = #{remarks}, owner_code = #{ownerCode}, group_id_ = #{groupId}, name_ = #{name}, ext_ = #{ext}, type_ = #{type}, size_ = #{size}, path_ = #{path}, pdf_path_ = #{pdfPath}, thumb_path_ = #{thumbPath}, upload_time_ = #{uploadTime}, upload_user_id_ = #{uploadUser.id}, upload_user_name_ = #{uploadUser.name}, sort = #{sort}, desc_ = #{desc}, duration_ = #{duration}, sec_flag_ = #{secFlag}, visit_count_ = #{visitCount}, to_pdf_ = #{toPdf}, secret_level = #{secretLevel}, url = #{url}, thumb_url = #{thumbUrl}, primary_path_ = #{primaryPath}, edit_objects = #{editObjects} WHERE id = #{id}
